name: Daily Digest
description: Daily morning email summary of yesterday's workspace activity, sent to the owner at a scheduled time.

args.subject: Your morning update from {{orgName}}
args.body:
Good morning {{firstName}},

Here's a gentle look at what came through the practice yesterday — a few new patient inquiries, some bookings on the calendar, and the usual rhythm of follow-ups. Nothing that needs you to jump in before coffee.

We'll keep an eye on things and flag anything that needs a real decision. Otherwise, today's chair time is yours.

Warmly,
Bright Smile Dental
